repository_metadata.document_name: Parliamentary Forensic Evidence Bundle: Systematic Governance Collapse (June 2026)
repository_metadata.architectural_purpose: Definitive cryptographically auditable structural blueprint for the parliamentary forensic evidence bundle, demonstrating systemic governance collapse across major South African health, financial, commercial, and Chapter 9 institutions.

core_philosophical_architecture.philosophy: Structure is evidence. A perfectly structured architectural hierarchy is evidence of intent, pattern, and systemic failure.

structural_pillars.flow_and_chronological: Seamless tracking of timelines to establish systemic progression.

focus_areas: Statutory Breaches of the Protected Disclosures Act

cryptographic_foundation.rationale: Prevent tampering, alterations, or selective editing by adversarial legal teams through mathematical incorruptibility and the avalanche effect.
cryptographic_foundation.enforcement: Every asset, document, email log, and affidavit must possess an immutable SHA-256 checksum validated during compilation.

validation_rules.strict_matching: If an assertion lacks an exact cross-reference hash or relative file path, the build MUST fail immediately.

file_manifest.json.description: Generated tracking file listing all files with their corresponding SHA-256 hashes.
